channel.title: Sable Podcasts
channel.description: AI-generated podcasts from your topics and resources
channel.itunes:author: Sable

item.title: Why Self-Help Methods Keep You Stuck
item.description: Exploring the nature of Truth and why conventional self-help approaches fail - generated from Kapil Gupta's discourses

item.title: The Sorcerer's Way To Escape The Eagle
item.description: Exploring Carlos Castaneda's teachings on energy, the assemblage point, and the three attentions - how to shift perception and escape being food for the Eagle

item.title: Slay Your Ego: The Rock Warrior Way
item.description: AI-generated podcast covering Arno Ilgner's The Rock Warrior's Way and Espresso Lessons - mental training for climbers including the warrior mindset, risk vs danger, conscious falling, attention training, and commitment.

item.title: How Your Subconscious Mind Builds Wealth
item.description: Based on Joseph Murphy's How to Attract Money - using subconscious mind, affirmations, and spiritual laws to attract wealth and abundance.

item.title: The Mechanics of Think and Grow Rich
item.description: Based on Napoleon Hill's Think and Grow Rich - desire, faith, auto-suggestion, specialized knowledge, imagination, organized planning, decision, persistence, and the mastermind principle.

item.title: Persuasion Tactics from The Boron Letters
item.description: Gary Halbert's copywriting wisdom from The Boron Letters - headlines, hooks, emotional triggers, storytelling, offers, persuasion techniques, and direct response marketing wisdom from his legendary letters to his son.
